return(function(...)local B,X do local v,k,d,j,O=math.floor,string.char,string.byte,tonumber,string.sub local function I(B,X)local k=0 for d=0,7,1 do local j=B/2+X/2 if j~=v(j)then k=k+2^d end B=v(B/2)X=v(X/2)end return k end local M,m="iiihhhiiiiihssss","\211\018\198\222\207\"\129\177\200\241\237\024\t\197\249\234\245\252\003\027\000\000\001\000\000\001\a\000\000\000__index\006\000\000\000__call\005\000\000\000__mod\005\000\000\000__mul"local Y=65 local x=1240 local h=false local function N(B)local N={}for X=1,#B,2 do local v=O(B,X,X+1)N[#N+1]=j(v,16)end local q={}for B=0,3,1 do local X=N[B+1]local v=((X-x)+256)%256 local k=d(M,B%16+1)local j=d(m,B%Y+1)q[B+1]=I(I(v,k),j)end local c=((q[1]+q[2]*256)+q[3]*65536)+q[4]*16777216 local G={}for B=1,c,1 do local X=N[B+4]if h and B%2==0 then X=(X%16)*16+v(X/16)end local j=((X-x)+256)%256 local O=(B-1)%16+1 local q=(B-1)%Y+1 local c=d(M,O)local b=d(m,q)G[B]=k(I(I(j,c),b))end return table.concat(G)end local c={}X=setmetatable({},{__index=function(B,X)return c[X]end;__call=function(B,X)return c[X]end,__mod=function(B,X)return c[X]end,__mul=function(B,X)return c[X]end;__metatable=false})function B(X)local v=c if not v[X]then for B=1,#q,1 do local k=q[B]local d=type(k[1])=="number"and k[1]or k[2]if d==X then local B=type(k[1])=="string"and k[1]or k[2]v[X]=N(B)break end end end return X end end return(function(v,d,j,O,I,M,m,g,G,Y,u,y,o,x,T,N,p,J,b,c,U,H,s,h,k,q)T,p,g,h,c,y,k,Y,J,N,q,H,G,x,u,s,b,U,o=function(B,X)local v=q(X)local d=function(d,j,O,I,M,m,Y,x)return k(B,{d,j,O,I,M,m;Y;x},X,v)end end,function()N=N+1 x[N]=1 return N end,function(B)local X,v=1,B[1]while v do x[v],X=x[v]-1,1+X if x[v]==0 then x[v],Y[v]=nil,nil end v=B[X]end end,function(B,X)local v=q(X)local
